# YOUR CODE HERE
def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    N = int(data[0])
    P = list(map(int, data[1:]))
    
    max_other = max(P[1:])  # Find the maximum among other people's scores
    required = max_other - P[0] + 1  # Calculate minimum x needed
    print(max(0, required))  # Ensure non-negative result

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
